content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "No evidence ledger items are provided, so the claim that ADS fixed defaults and Pakistan labour law have been applied is unsupported.", "fix": "Either add ledger items showing what the ADS fixed defaults and Pakistan labour law requirements are, or remove/soften references to having applied them."}, {"problem": "Checklist item 'ADS fixed defaults applied and Pakistan labour law compliance table checked (Pipeline G only)' is not satisfied; there is no explicit compliance table or reference to it.", "fix": "Insert a brief Pakistan labour law compliance table/section or explicit statement that such a table has been checked, consistent with ADS defaults."}, {"problem": "Checklist item 'NNN maintenance matrix populated; structural repairs not shifted to tenant without instruction' is not met; there is no NNN maintenance matrix and no discussion of maintenance/structural repairs allocation.", "fix": "Add a short NNN maintenance matrix section or confirm that it is not applicable in this employment context and adjust the checklist reference accordingly."}, {"problem": "Checklist item 'Flow-down obligations verified for subcontractor agreements' is only partially addressed; while flow-down obligations are mentioned, there is no indication of verification against any upstream terms.", "fix": "Clarify that flow-down obligations will mirror and comply with applicable client contracts, or reference a separate verification process/policy."}]}
